en.ch03Step1Heading: How to manage your health in MyChart
en.ch03Step1VideoPH: How-to clips â€” Request a medication refill, schedule a follow-up appointment, and send a secure message
en.ch03Step2Intro: Elena manages her mother Clara's health. Clara needs a refill on her blood pressure medicine.
en.ch03Step2Intro2: Help Elena find the Medications tile and send a message to Clara's doctor.
en.ch03Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 â€” Do it on your phone
en.ch03Step3Heading: Now try it on your own MyChart
en.ch03Step3Intro: Open MyChart on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch03Check1: Tap the Medications tile. Find a medicine you are taking and practice tapping "Request Refill." Stop before confirming.
en.ch03Check2: Tap the Appointments tile. Tap "Schedule a New Appointment." Practice selecting your doctor and choosing a date. Cancel before confirming.
en.ch03Check3: Tap the Messages tile. Tap "New Message." Select your Navigator Person as the recipient.
en.ch03Check4: Type a short message, like "Hello, I completed Challenge 03."
